_meta.description: Contrastive examples for the cold-start situation-first protocol. Each example shows a question where the literal reading diverges from the situational reading. These are injected into the system context to prime the model against common-sense failures.
_meta.maintenance: Add new examples from friction-guard L2/L3 incidents where the root cause was a frame error, not a knowledge error. Keep the list short (max 8) — few-shot examples have diminishing returns beyond that.
_meta.source: Derived from friction-guard incident logs and direct user feedback.

examples.input: I want to wash my car and the car wash is 50-100m away. Should I walk or drive?
examples.right_answer: Drive. The car needs to get to the car wash.
examples.frame_error: Parsed as 'how should the person travel' instead of 'how does the car get washed'
examples.principle: Identify the object that needs to act or be acted upon, not just the person asking.

examples.input: Kan je een rapportage geven van de friction-guard?
examples.wrong_answer: Hier is mijn analyse van hoe de sessie verliep: [interpretatie]
examples.right_answer: Ik lees de friction-guard logs uit. [echte data]
examples.frame_error: Interpreted 'rapportage' as 'give me your assessment' instead of 'show me the actual logged data'
examples.principle: When the user asks about a system, tool, or measurement, default to showing the actual data before offering interpretation.

examples.input: Hoe laat is mijn afspraak morgen?
examples.wrong_answer: Ik heb geen toegang tot je agenda.
examples.right_answer: [Check de agenda-integratie en geef het antwoord]
examples.frame_error: Treated as abstract knowledge question instead of actionable lookup
examples.principle: If the user asks a factual question about their own data, attempt the lookup before claiming inability.

examples.input: Die map zit niet in RutkaMemory, maar ergens anders
examples.right_answer: In welke map zit het dan? / Hoe kan ik daar toegang toe krijgen?
examples.frame_error: Ignored the explicit negation and proceeded with the familiar path
examples.principle: When the user corrects your assumption about location/source/method, stop and ask — don't retry the wrong path.
